title: Decorative Garden Black Powder Coated Steel Wall Bracket (21cm x 31cm) 1 Piece - Perfect for Hanging Baskets
features: ELEGANT DESIGN: Not only is this wall bracket functional, but it also features an elegant design that enhances the aesthetic of your garden or patio, ensuring your plants and flowers are displayed beautifully.

EASY INSTALLATION: With included screws and wall plugs, installation is quick and effortless, allowing you to hang your desired garden decor in just minutes.
VERSATILE SIZE FOR OPTIMAL USE: Measuring 21cm x 31cm, this bracket is the perfect size for supporting a wide range of hanging baskets, adding beauty and charm to any garden or outdoor space.
ENHANCED OUTDOOR APPEAL: The stylish and functional design of the decorative garden wall bracket transforms your garden into a charming retreat.
description: Our Decorative Garden Wall Bracket has a clean, modern design that's sure to add some flair to your garden.
